title: Schrembli2
description: A modpack that aims to enhance vanilla minecraft. Focused on exploration, adventure, bosses, and building.
body:
## Schrembli2
This modpack aims to expand on vanilla minecraft. Mainly focused on exploration, combat, and building. This modpack was originally made for a personal minecraft server with my friends but anyone can download it and use it as they like.

Available on Curseforge [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/schrembli2).

Original:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/schrembli-pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/schrembli-pack)

## Main Mods:
### Exploration
- Terralith and Tectonic greatly enhance terrain generation
- Oh the Biomes You'll Go adds more biomes, woodtypes, and more
- YUNG's better structures improve on vanilla structures
- Amplified Nether makes the nether bigger and better
- Nullscape completely transforms the End's terrain generation
- ???: A new dimension

### Monsters and Bosses
- Bosses of Mass Destruction adds challenging boss battles
- Ender Dragon Fight Remastered makes the ender dragon a more fitting final boss
- Mutant Monsters adds challenging mutant variants to a few mobs

### Weapons and Equipment
- Gate of Babylon adds more weapon variants and enchantments
- Trinkets adds more armour slots to equip special items
- Inmis adds simple backpacks for more storage
- Artifacts adds some Terraria inspired trinkets
- Dragon Loot adds upgrades to netherite armour and weapons

### Technology
- Create allows for cool contraptions, automation, and much more
- Hex Casting adds a subtle yet deep and complex magic system

### Other
- Adorn adds simple vanilla style furniture
- Farmer's Delight expands on farming and cooking
- Go Fish expands on fishing taking inspiration from both Stardew Valley and Terraria
- AmbientSounds and Sound Physics Remastered add more immersive sounds
- Many QoL and optimization mods included

## 
Note that this modpack includes some mods which are only available on curseforge:
- [Capybara](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capybara-fabric)
- [Jumpy-Boats](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jumpy-boats-fabric)
